creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Neel Chauhan from comment #0)

Without attempting to run bad_shar

tmpfs for /tmp and ZFS (OpenZFS) for /var/tmp seem to be OK for me: 

% cd /tmp
% mkdir directory^M
% file directory^M
directory^M: directory
% rm -r directory^M
% cd /var/tmp
% mkdir directory^M
% file directory^M
directory^M: directory
% rm -r directory^M
% less /tmp/bad_shar 
% echo $0
/bin/tcsh
% whoami
grahamperrin
% date 
Sat 13 Aug 2022 06:55:42 BST
% uname -aKU
FreeBSD mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd 14.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #16 main-n256889-17a4a163df85: Sun Jul 24 13:20:10 BST 2022     grahamperrin@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC-NODEBUG amd64 1400064 1400064
%
